ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postcodes" (
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postcode record */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode in alphanumeric format */,
  "positional_quality_indicator" INTEGER /* Quality indicator for the positional accuracy of the postcode */,
  "eastings" INTEGER /* Eastings coordinate in the national grid */,
  "northings" INTEGER /* Northings coordinate in the national grid */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as per geographical standards */,
  "nhs_regional_health_authority_code" TEXT /* NHS regional health authority code */,
  "nhs_health_authority_code" TEXT /* NHS health authority code */,
  "admin_county_code" TEXT /* Administrative county code */,
  "admin_district_code" TEXT /* Administrative district code */,
  "admin_ward_code" TEXT /* Administrative ward code */,
  "etrs89_lat" REAL /* Latitude in ETRS89 geographic coordinate system */,
  "etrs89_long" REAL /* Longitude in ETRS89 geographic coordinate system */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count of the area covered by the postcode */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the residents in the area */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the area */,
  "nearest_health_facility_distance" REAL /* Distance to the nearest health facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_admin_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("admin_district_code") REFERENCES administrative_districts ("district_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_admin_county_code FOREIGN KEY ("admin_county_code") REFERENCES administrative_counties ("county_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_nhs_health_authority_code FOREIGN KEY ("nhs_health_authority_code") REFERENCES nhs_health_authorities ("authority_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_admin_ward_code FOREIGN KEY ("admin_ward_code") REFERENCES administrative_wards ("ward_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_nhs_regional_health_authority_code FOREIGN KEY ("nhs_regional_health_authority_code") REFERENCES nhs_regional_authorities ("authority_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (ISO format) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nhs_regional_authorities" (
  "regional_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional health authority */,
  "authority_code" TEXT /* Code for the regional health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the regional health authority */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population covered by the regional health authority */,
  "area" REAL /* Area covered by the regional health authority in square kilometers */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nhs_health_authorities" (
  "health_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "authority_code" TEXT /* Code for the health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population covered by the health authority */,
  "area" REAL /* Area covered by the health authority in square kilometers */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code for the administrative county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code for the administrative district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the district */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrative_wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative ward */,
  "ward_code" TEXT /* Code for the administrative ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative ward */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "health_facilities_count" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the ward */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role in the system (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the postcode being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_postcode_id FOREIGN KEY ("postcode_id") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
